content.speakerText: I just finished the Q3 report—hope it meets your expectations.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚做完第三季度报告，希望符合你的期望。
expectedAnswers: This is next-level work—you saved us hours!
Wow, this is so well-organized and detailed. Really impressive.
I'm impressed by how clearly you summarized the data. This will help the whole team.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达赞美而非敷衍或批评
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用职场常用表达，如 next-level, impressive, saved time
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个赞美关键词（如 clear, thorough, saved time）

content.speakerText: Thanks, I really appreciate you saying that.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢，我很感激你这么说。
expectedAnswers: You deserve it—keep up the amazing work!
Anytime! You're a total rockstar on this team.
Of course! Your effort doesn't go unnoticed.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否强化对方价值并鼓励持续表现
语言准确性：语法正确，无搭配错误（如 avoid 'you are good'）
表达自然度：是否使用地道口语表达（rockstar, killing it, go unnoticed）
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个肯定性评价词（deserve, rockstar, amazing）

content.speakerText: I stayed late to fix the bugs in the code before the demo.
content.speakerTextCn: 我加班修复了演示前的代码错误。
expectedAnswers: That’s dedication—your attention to detail saved the whole presentation.
You went above and beyond! The client will love this.
Seriously, your commitment makes a huge difference. Thank you!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否认可努力与贡献，而非仅结果
语言准确性：语法正确，动词搭配恰当（went above and beyond）
表达自然度：是否使用职场高阶赞美表达（dedication, commitment, makes a difference）
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个赞美关键词（dedication, attention to detail, commitment）
